sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Current state is N=37, Y=19
# Click on the left green U-shape (20, 39) to shrink the green bar
# Need to do this twice to reach N=19
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 20, 'col': 39}, {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 20, 'col': 39}], intent='solve')
print("Result:", last_action_result)

# Check current bar lengths
seg = current_frame.segmentation
n_pixels = sum(n['pixels'] for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N')
y_pixels = sum(n['pixels'] for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'Y')
print(f"Current: N={n_pixels}, Y={y_pixels}")

if last_action_result.get('level_completed') or last_action_result.get('done'):
    print("LEVEL COMPLETED!")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
